creator: taosecurity@gmail.com
text:
FYI -- I just installed FreeBSD 7.0-RC2 on this machine and it
recognizes the drives!

$ uname -a
FreeBSD edited.edited.com 7.0-RC2 FreeBSD 7.0-RC2 #0: Fri Feb  8
00:09:57 UTC 2008
root@logan.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386

ad2: 152587MB <WDC WD1600AAJS-75PSA0 05.06H05> at ata1-master SATA150
ad3: 152587MB <WDC WD1600AAJS-75PSA0 05.06H05> at ata1-slave SATA150

$ df -h
Filesystem     Size    Used   Avail Capacity  Mounted on
/dev/ad2s1a    989M    129M    782M    14%    /
devfs          1.0K    1.0K      0B   100%    /dev
/dev/ad2s1e    989M     22K    910M     0%    /home
/dev/ad2s1h     75G    4.0K     69G     0%    /nsm1
/dev/ad3s1e    144G    4.0K    132G     0%    /nsm2
/dev/ad2s1f    989M     12K    910M     0%    /tmp
/dev/ad3s1d    496M    4.0K    456M     0%    /tmp2
/dev/ad2s1d    9.7G    755M    8.2G     8%    /usr
/dev/ad2s1g     54G    236K     50G     0%    /var

Thank you!
